case_title: COAST EXPORTS, INC. VS. EDWARD JEW et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,280.83 FILED BY COAST EXPORTS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JEW, EDWARD BROTHER SEAFOOD INC GO GO CAFE RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-29-2010 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS INVALID/INCOMPLETE: (1) EDWARD JEW IS LISTED AS PARTY SERVED. (2) COAST EXPORTS, INC IS NAMED AS COMPANY SERVED. (3) SC-120 - DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS CHECKED AS BEING SERVED ON THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF STATES/ADMITS THAT HE COMPLETED SC-104 TODAY AT THE COUNTER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-06-2010 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $15.00) SERVED NOV-15-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JEW, EDWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $15.00) SERVED NOV-15-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROTHER SEAFOOD INC
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO GO GO CAFE RESTAURANT BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-06-2010 AT 6:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COAST EXPORTS, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JEW, EDWARD BROTHER SEAFOOD INC DEFENDANT GO GO CAFE RESTAURANT DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COAST EXPORTS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF COAST EXPORTS, INC. SERVED SEP-20-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JEW, EDWARD
CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO BROTHER SEAFOOD INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFENDANT EDWARD JEW.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.
